source_title: 07 Lighting/01 The Cost of Real-time Rendering

evidences.content: 因此，我们要快速回顾一下虚幻世界中的灯光、 So as a quick recap for our lights inside of Unreal, 在虚幻中，实际上只有三种不同类型的灯光。 there's really only three different types of lights inside of Unreal. 这就是定向光，也就是我们常说的阳光、 That's a directional light, which is better known as a sunlight, 这将自动与天空大气和体积云系统互动。 and this will automatically interact with the sky atmosphere and volumetric cloud systems. 你应该知道，定向灯有自己的阴影设置 And you should know that directional lights have their own shadow settings 定向灯细节面板内侧、 inside of the detail panel of the directional light, 如果你想更改或改进质量设置，请点击这里。 if you ever want to mess with that or improve the quality settings. 天窗是在室外和室内模拟反弹照明的一种方式。 Skylights are a way of simulating bounce lighting in exteriors and interiors. 这主要是在 Lumen 之前使用的，但现在仍然非常非常有用。 This was mainly used before Lumen, but it's still very, very helpful. 我们甚至可以直接将 HDR 输入到天窗的指定立方体地图插槽中、 And we can even input HDRs directly into the specified cubemap slot of our skylights, 这将给我们带来非常好的结果。 which will give us a very good result. 否则，我们可以即时捕捉 3D 场景、 Otherwise, we can capture the 3D scene on the fly, 我们可以使用实时场景捕捉来实现这一点。 and we can do that using the real-time scene capture. 如果选中实时场景捕捉，然后又取消选中、 If you check and then uncheck the real-time scene capture, 将更新我们的天窗，以确保它能捕捉到最新、最棒的天球 that'll refresh our skylight to make sure that it captures the latest and greatest skysphere 同时也会提高我们的反思能力。 and will also improve our reflections at the same time. 最后，我们还有点光源，但不仅仅是点光源。 And lastly, we have our point lights, but it's not just point lights. 还有聚光灯和矩形灯。 It's also spotlights and rectangle lights. 实际上，我们只是改变了这些灯的尺寸、 We're really just changing the size of these lights, 我们正在改变阴影的投射方式。 and we're changing the way that the shadows are cast. 从创意的角度来看，我们只需要知道这些就够了。 And from a creative standpoint, that's really all we need to know. 不过，我想简要地讨论一下游戏引擎中的灯光技术问题。 But briefly, I want to discuss the technical side of lighting inside of a game engine. 现在，这可能会变得技术含量很高、 Now, this can get really technically dense, 所以我就不一一介绍关于灯光的小细节了、 so I'm not going to go through every tiny little detail about lights, 但我要重点介绍的正是你们需要知道的。 but I am going to focus on exactly what you need to know. 我想先谈谈局限性、 And I want to talk about the limitations up front, 以便您知道如何排除任何照明故障 so you know how to troubleshoot any lighting 以防在场景照明时出现伪影。 in case there's any artifacts that pop up as you're lighting your scene. 那我们就直奔主题吧。 So let's just jump right into it. 因此，我想了解的是，实时渲染的成本是多少、 So the way I want to look through this is what is the cost of real-time rendering, 具体来说，渲染一帧画面需要多长时间？ and specifically, how long does it take to render a single frame? 因此，我们可以通过运行一些控制台命令来计算、 So we can actually calculate that by running some console commands, 第一个是统计 GPU、 the first one being stat GPU, 它将分解进入我们框架的每一个计算。 which will break down every single calculation going into our frame. 我们可以看到，在这种情况下，渲染一帧画面需要 17 毫秒、 And we can see that this takes 17 milliseconds to render a single frame in this case, 但这只是在 GPU 上。 but that's only on the GPU. 统计单元将为我们提供所有计时器。 Stat unit is going to give us all of our timers. 现在，统计单元中最重要的是帧数。 Now, the important one in stat unit is the frame count. 这就是渲染该帧所花费的总时间。 So this is the total amount of time it took to render that frame. 统计单位包括 GPU 渲染所需的时间。 Included in stat unit is the amount of time it took the GPU to render it. 在这里，我们可以看到 GPU 是成本最高的部件之一、 And here we can see that the GPU is among the most costly things in this case, 但我们不会把所有这些加在一起。 but we're not adding all of these together. 其中很多数字都是由 GPU 计算得出的 A lot of these numbers are split between what the GPU is calculating 以及 CPU 正在计算的内容、 and what the CPU is calculating, 他们可以同时完成这些工作。 and they can do these at the same time. 但当我们谈论照明时 But when we're talking about lighting, 让我们来看看 GPU 的顶部。 let's look at the top of stat GPU here. 我们会发现，场景中最昂贵的是阴影深度、 We'll see that the most expensive thing in our scene are the shadow depths, 这是因为阴影的渲染成本非常高。 and that's because shadows are really expensive to render. 每当我说贵或这东西更贵时、 And whenever I say expensive or this costs more, 我的意思是，在 GPU 上计算这些特定的东西需要更长的时间。 I'm just meaning that it's going to take longer on the GPU to calculate these certain things. 因此，当我们使用动态照明时、 So when we use dynamic lighting, 每一帧都要重新渲染灯光和阴影。 the lights and the shadows are being re-rendered every single frame. 因此，上一帧没有任何内容被保留下来。 So nothing is being carried over from the last frame. 它每一帧都会重新渲染场景中的所有灯光。 It's re-rendering all the lights in our scene every single frame. 动态照明是指我们使用可移动和固定的灯光。 And dynamic lighting is when we're using movable and stationary lights. 而阴影是这些动态灯光最昂贵的部分。 And shadows are the most expensive aspect of these dynamic lights. 灯具本身的实际铸造成本并不高。 The actual casting of the lights themselves is not that expensive. 这是我们场景中阴影的绘制。 It's the drawing of the shadows in our scene. 一个简单的经验法则是，阴影越多 And a quick rule of thumb, the more shadows 或在场景中投射阴影的灯光越多、 or the more lights that are casting shadows in our scene, 渲染时间就越长。那么这在虚幻中是什么样子的呢？ the longer the render time. So what does this look like inside of Unreal? 现在，我正在 ICVFX 示例项目中 Right now, I'm in the ICVFX sample project 我已将烘焙照明转换为动态照明 and I've gone ahead and converted this from baked lighting to dynamic lighting 和 Lumen。因此，如果我按下 tilde 键，然后输入 Stat GPU、 and Lumen. So if I press the tilde key and then type in Stat GPU, 这样我才能让计数器显示出来。 this is how I can get that counter to show up. 同样，我们会发现阴影深度是这里最昂贵的东西。 And again, we'll see that shadow depths are the most expensive thing here. 但如果我搜索场景中的所有聚光灯、 But if I search for all of the spotlights in my scene, 我可以查看这个聚光灯的细节面板。 I can look at the details panel of this spotlight. 如果我输入阴影 And if I type in shadow 而我只关注这个聚光灯的阴影细节、 and I only look for the shadow details of this spotlight, 你会看到我可以启用或禁用每种灯光的投射阴影。 you'll see that I can enable or disable cast shadows for every single light. 如果我在这里禁用投射阴影选项、 And if I disable the cast shadows option here, 阴影深度的计算时间会更短。 it'll take the shadow depths less time to calculate. 现在，只在一盏灯上做这样的改动并不会产生很大的影响。 Now just changing this on one light won't make a very big difference. 但如果我们在整个场景中都这样做，它就会这样。 But if we do this throughout our entire scene, it will. 当我们的场景中有 43 种不同的灯光时、 And when we have 43 different lights in our scene, 确定哪些灯光需要投射阴影非常重要 it's very important to determine which lights actually require cast shadows 我们甚至无法感知它投下的阴影 and what lights are we not even going to perceive the shadows that it's going to cast 因此，我们可以将其禁用。 and therefore we could just disable that. 现在 Stat GPU 是我使用最多的命令、 Now Stat GPU is the most used command that I have, 但同样，我们也可以输入 Stat Unit。 but again, we can also type in Stat Unit. 当你看到这个框架计数器时 And when you see this frame counter here, 是当前帧渲染所花费的总时间 that's the total amount of time it's taking this current frame to render 并且每隔一格都在更新。 and it's updating every single tick. 在这里的计算中，以每秒 24 帧的速度渲染需要 41 毫秒。 In the calculation here, it takes 41 milliseconds to render at 24 frames a second. 所以，只要不超过 41 毫秒就可以了、 So as long as that's under 41 milliseconds, 这意味着我们的渲染速度比电影播放速度还要快。 that means that we're rendering faster than a movie would play back. 因此，我们应该可以在 Sequencer 中正常播放。 So we should be able to play this in Sequencer just fine. 然后再次输入命令，即可同时隐藏 Stat GPU 和 Stat Unit。 And then you just type in the command again to hide both Stat GPU and Stat Unit. 现在让我们来谈谈灯光的移动性。 Now let's talk about a light's mobility. 我们知道场景中有动态照明 We know we have dynamic lighting inside of our scene 当我们所有的灯都设置为可移动或固定时。 when all of our lights are set to either movable or stationary. 现在，即使在游戏中，我们也可以在场景中移动可移动的灯光。 Now movable lights, we can move around in the scene even when the game is playing. 但是，如果我们将其固定下来、 But if we make this stationary, 它将禁用一些功能，这样光线的计算速度就会更快。 it's going to disable a couple features so that this light will calculate faster. 而这样做的代价是，我们无法在游戏过程中移动它、 And the trade-off for this is that we can't move this around during gameplay, 但仍会在场景中投射动态阴影。 but it will still cast dynamic shadows in the scene. 但是，如果我将流动性改为静态、 But if I change the mobility to static instead, 这是用于烘焙照明系统的。 this is for the baked lighting system.
evidences.speaker: instructor
